tags.name: Aasiaat Nugguat
tags.validation_note: Rocky reef near Aasiaat, south of Disko Bay. Regional sources confirm Arctic kelp reef diving in this area but no site-specific sources found for Aasiaat Nugguat. Depth 20m unconfirmed — OSM value retained. Cannot mark validated without 3+ site-specific sources.

tags.name: Maniitsup Ikkannersua, Maniitsup Ikkannera
tags.source:name: NAA-t ataatsimiinnerat febr. 27-at ??. Suliaq 16.3.93
tags.validation_note: Shallow rocky bank in west Greenland waters near Maniitsoq (Sukkertoppen). OSM tags this as a natural bank (Banke). No site-specific dive sources found. Depth 18m is OSM value, unconfirmed.

tags.name: Carl
tags.validation_note: OSM seamark wreck at 74.7N 18.3W (northeast Greenland, likely Scoresby Sund area). No independent sources found confirming vessel identity, history, tonnage, dimensions, sinking cause, or dive conditions. Name 'Carl' appears only in OSM data. Depth 40m is unconfirmed. Cannot validate without 2+ independent wreck history sources. Deep research required from Greenlandic maritime records.

tags.name: Nuugaatsiaap Ikkannera
tags.validation_note: Rocky reef near abandoned settlement of Nuugaatsiaq, northwest Greenland. No site-specific dive sources found. Nuugaatsiaq was evacuated after 2017 landslide-tsunami (confirmed by USGS and Wikipedia) but no dive surveys of underwater topography changes confirmed. Depth 22m is OSM value.

tags.name: Qerruannguit
tags.validation_note: Rocky reef in Disko Bay region of west Greenland. No site-specific dive sources found. Depth 16m is OSM value. Regional sources confirm Disko Bay area features rocky kelp reefs with anemones and cold-water fauna.

tags.name: Ikkanneq
tags.validation_note: Rocky reef north of Disko Bay, west Greenland. No site-specific dive sources found. Depth 18m is OSM value. Coordinates place this north of Ilulissat.
